subject: chemistry
title: 18M.1.SL.TZ1.24
question_html:
What are possible names of a molecule with molecular formula C4H10O?

        I.     1-Methoxypropane

        II.     2-Methylpropan-2-ol

        III.     Butanal

A.     I and II only

B.     I and III only

C.     II and III only

D.     I, II and III
